text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what da heck?! I got a sunburn everywhere
'cept where my headband was!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Dammit! I forgot to put sunscreen on!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: ...Time to bust out the aloe vera.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross fusses over her skin in an
uncharacteristic fashion...
